title: CGPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 46 Assistant Engineer Posts
description: The Chhattisgarh Public Service Commission (CGPSC) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of 46 Assistant Engineer Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.e/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the CGPSC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candida...
